question: Will Apple announce Gemini-powered Siri features at WWDC 2026 (June 8-12)?
reason: Apple has confirmed Siri will be powered by Google's Gemini model, with an official announcement expected at WWDC 2026.
evidence: Apple confirmed Siri will be powered by Google's Gemini model in January 2026.
Apple's WWDC 2026 announcement highlights AI advancements, including Siri updates.
Apple's promotional materials for WWDC 2026 hint at a redesigned Siri interface.
Apple's CEO Tim Cook emphasized the collaboration with Google for Siri's AI foundation.
Apple's WWDC 2026 keynote is scheduled for June 8, 2026, where the announcement is anticipated.
